title: Application layer protocol implementation
description: Implement the application layer protocols defined in spec/07-transport-app.md. Port-based dispatch, compact CoT encoding, SCHC Rule 2 for MQTT-SN, gateway translations. All software-only work against the spec.
close_reason: All 7 children complete: SCHC Rule 2, compact CoT codec, UDP dispatch, test vectors, CoT↔XML gateway, APRS-IS.
